series_metadata.series_description: The Audio/Visual Correspondence is an email generated by the BWC library with the purpose of letting a person or company know when a barrowed audio/visual tape, DVD, or Power Point presentation is past the due date. A correspondence is also generated when the material has been damaged or lost and BWC is requesting the burrower replace the material.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep overdue notice until audio/visual material is returned, then destroy. Keep letters about lost audio/visual material for 1 year, then destroy. ; Electronic: Keep overdue notice until audio/visual material is returned, then destroy. Keep letters about lost audio/visual material for 1 year, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
